summary: Iteration 133: Testing 3D Cake Designer v2 and Canvas editor color scheme migration. CakeDesigner3D works perfectly with all features. Canvas Design tab loads but shows minimal UI (toolbar only, missing full editor panels). Color migration from cyan/magenta to gold/neutral verified - no #00f0ff or #ff00ff found, #c8a97e gold accent present. Backend APIs working.

minor.issue: Returns 404 Not Found - endpoint may not be implemented

ui_bugs.component: Canvas Design tab in CAKE BUILDER
ui_bugs.issue: Canvas Design editor loads but shows minimal UI - only left toolbar visible, missing Echo Canvas header, right panel tabs (AI, Props, Vector, Smart), and layers panel. The editor content area appears mostly black.

issues: Editor UI not fully rendering - may be height/layout issue when embedded in Pastry module

action_items: Investigate Canvas Design editor layout issue - editor loads but full UI (header, right panel, layers) not visible when embedded in Pastry module
The Editor component may need height adjustments for embedded use case
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed syntax error in /app/client/modules/ChefGioTraining/index.tsx - indentation issue in JSX structure
Canvas Design editor designed for full-screen use may not render properly when embedded with constrained height

success_rate.backend: 100% - All tested APIs working (yields, pos-analytics, weather)
success_rate.frontend: 85% - CakeDesigner3D fully working, Canvas Design tab partially working

verified_features.FRONTEND_no_magenta_color: PASS - No #ff00ff magenta color found in Canvas Design

color_migration_verification.new_gold_c8a97e: FOUND - Enterprise gold accent in use

context_for_next_testing_agent: CakeDesigner3D is fully functional. Canvas Design tab loads but the full editor UI (Echo Canvas header, right panel tabs, layers panel) is not visible - only left toolbar shows. This may be a height/layout issue when the Editor component is embedded in the Pastry module. The color migration from cyan/magenta to gold/neutral is verified complete.
